```esql
ROW input = "Mozilla/5.0 (Macintosh; Intel Mac OS X 10_9_2) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/33.0.1750.149 Safari/537.36"
| USER_AGENT ua = input WITH { "extract_device_type": true }
| KEEP ua.*
```
